name: 仲恩生醫 Steminent
mechanism: 異體脂肪 MSC（旁分泌神經保護、誘導自噬清除突變 ataxin-3）
pipeline: Stemchymal®｜SCA1/2/3/6（pan-polyQ）：日本承認審查中（SCA3/6，優先審查）、台灣附款許可並行、美國 Ph2（UCLA+USF，2026，單臂＋自然史對照）
insight: 本社。手握台日 Ph2 隨機雙盲安慰劑對照正面數據 ＋ 日本優先審查 ＋ 最接近取證，是全賽道唯一有 Ph2 對照證據的資產。

updates.text: REPROCELL 送日本製造販賣『承認』申請（SCA3/6）＋『業』許可送神奈川縣

en.name: Steminent Biotherapeutics
en.mechanism: Allogeneic adipose MSC (paracrine neuroprotection; induces autophagy to clear mutant ataxin-3)
en.pipeline: Stemchymal® | SCA1/2/3/6 (pan-polyQ): under Japanese marketing review (SCA3/6, priority review), Taiwan conditional approval in parallel, US Ph2 (UCLA + USF, 2026, single-arm with natural-history control)
en.insight: Us. Holding positive randomised, double-blind, placebo-controlled Ph2 data from Taiwan and Japan plus Japanese priority review, and closest to approval — the only asset in the field with controlled Ph2 evidence.

updates.text: REPROCELL filed the Japanese marketing approval application (SCA3/6) and the MAH business licence with Kanagawa Prefecture

name: Biohaven
mechanism: 小分子（麩胺酸調節，利魯唑前驅藥）
pipeline: Troriluzole（BHV-4157）｜pan-SCA：Ph3 全體終點未達、SCA3 次族群近顯著；NDA 遭 FDA CRL
insight: 最領先的口服對手但取證受挫：2025/11 FDA CRL、研發砍 60%。其真實世界外部對照證據不被 FDA 接受，反襯本社隨機對照的方法學優勢。

updates.text: 削減約 60% 研發支出、爭取與 FDA 再協商

en.pipeline: Troriluzole (BHV-4157) | pan-SCA: Ph3 missed in the overall population, SCA3 subgroup near-significant; NDA received an FDA CRL
en.insight: The most advanced oral rival, but blocked at approval: FDA CRL in 2025/11 and a 60% R&D cut. Its real-world externally controlled evidence was not accepted by the FDA, underscoring our randomised-controlled methodological advantage.

updates.text: Cut R&D spending by about 60% and sought further discussions with the FDA

name: IntraBio
mechanism: 小分子 Levacetylleucine（N-acetyl-L-leucine，口服）
pipeline: IB1001｜CACNA1A 相關疾病（含 SCA6、EA2、FHM1）：Ph3 IB1001-304，2026/05 監管放行、估 2026/09 起始｜同成分 Aqneursa 已於 Niemann-Pick C 上市
insight: 以已上市成分（Aqneursa／levacetylleucine）延伸至 CACNA1A 相關共濟失調，樞紐試驗主要指標為 SARA、n≈60、12 週交叉設計——開發成本與時程風險低於全新分子。SCA6 與本社日本申請適應症重疊，惟屬症狀改善型小分子、非疾病修飾細胞療法，定位可區隔。

updates.text: CACNA1A（含 SCA6）Ph3 樞紐試驗獲美/英/歐/瑞監管放行
NCT07221292 登錄更新，12 站點、估 2026/09 開始收案

en.pipeline: IB1001 | CACNA1A-related disorders (incl. SCA6, EA2, FHM1): Ph3 IB1001-304, cleared 2026/05, estimated start 2026/09 | the same molecule is marketed as Aqneursa in Niemann-Pick C
en.insight: Extends an already-marketed molecule (Aqneursa / levacetylleucine) into CACNA1A-related ataxia; the pivotal trial uses SARA as primary endpoint, n≈60, 12-week crossover — lower cost and timeline risk than a novel molecule. SCA6 overlaps the indication in our Japan filing, though it is a symptomatic small molecule rather than a disease-modifying cell therapy, so positioning can be differentiated.

updates.text: Ph3 pivotal trial in CACNA1A (incl. SCA6) authorised in US/UK/EU/Switzerland
NCT07221292 registry update: 12 sites, estimated enrolment start 2026/09

name: Vico Therapeutics
mechanism: 反義寡核苷酸 ASO（CAG exon-skipping，源自 LUMC）
pipeline: VO659｜SCA1 / SCA3 / 亨丁頓舞蹈症（HD）：Ph1/2a 進行中（歐洲）
insight: 與本社在 SCA3 重疊、時程遠期。SCA3 CSF 突變 ataxin-3 未見下降、SCA 尚無明確療效，且有 radiculitis 神經根炎安全訊號（鞘內注射 vs 本社靜脈輸注）。

updates.text: 改半年一次給藥的 Ph1/2 收案

en.mechanism: Antisense oligonucleotide (CAG exon skipping, licensed from LUMC)
en.pipeline: VO659 | SCA1 / SCA3 / Huntington’s disease: Ph1/2a ongoing (Europe)
en.insight: Overlaps with us in SCA3 but is years away. CSF mutant ataxin-3 has not fallen in SCA3, there is still no clear SCA efficacy, and radiculitis has appeared as a safety signal (intrathecal dosing vs our intravenous infusion).

updates.text: Moved to dosing a Ph1/2 cohort on a twice-yearly regimen

name: Arrowhead / Sarepta
mechanism: siRNA（RNAi，標的 ATXN2）
insight: SCA2 版的上游 gene-silencing，鞘內給藥；本社刻意避開台灣 SCA2 主因。與 Stemchymal（主 SCA3/6）非直接重疊，屬鄰域監控。

updates.text: Ph1（n=39）收滿、2026 年中停止收案，primary completion 估 2026/12

en.pipeline: ARO-ATXN2 | SCA2: Ph1 (NCT06672445) enrolment closed, sites include Taipei Veterans General Hospital
en.insight: The SCA2 version of upstream gene silencing, dosed intrathecally; the main reason we deliberately avoid SCA2 in Taiwan. It does not directly overlap Stemchymal (mainly SCA3/6), so this is adjacent-space monitoring.

updates.text: Ph1 (n=39) fully enrolled, enrolment closed mid-2026, primary completion estimated 2026/12

name: Biogen / Ionis
mechanism: 反義寡核苷酸 ASO（標的 ATXN3，非選擇性）
insight: 資源雄厚大廠退出 SCA3 賽道——標的對、載具送不到深部小腦。對含 SCA3 的 Stemchymal 屬正面。注意 Roche 亦持有 ATXN3 ASO 專利，ATXN3 空間不只一家。

updates.text: 宣布停止 SCA3 BIIB132 Ph1（研發優先化重整）

en.pipeline: BIIB132 (ION260) | SCA3: Ph1 (MERA) discontinued by the sponsor in 2023/04
en.insight: A deep-pocketed large-cap has left the SCA3 field — right target, but the vehicle could not reach the deep cerebellum. Positive for Stemchymal, which covers SCA3. Note that Roche also holds ATXN3 ASO patents; the ATXN3 space has more than one player.

updates.text: Announced it was stopping the SCA3 BIIB132 Ph1 (pipeline reprioritisation)

name: Cure Rare Disease
mechanism: 反義寡核苷酸 ASO（單股，標的 ATXN3）
insight: 非營利生技，技術與 Vico 同源自 LUMC。2025/05 獲 FDA 孤兒藥資格、CIRM $5.7M 補助。時程落後 Stemchymal 甚多，長線監測。

updates.text: 獲 FDA 孤兒藥資格（SCA3）

en.insight: A non-profit biotech whose technology comes from LUMC, the same origin as Vico’s. FDA orphan designation in 2025/05 and a $5.7M CIRM grant. Far behind Stemchymal on timeline; long-range monitoring.

updates.text: Received FDA orphan drug designation (SCA3)

name: uniQure 等 AAV 基因療法
mechanism: AAV 基因療法
pipeline: AAV 基因療法｜SCA（多型）：臨床前/早期，離臨床尚遠
insight: 學界與數家 biotech 探索中；uniQure AMT-150（AAV）近年已去優先化。屬遠期低威脅，反映共濟失調領域投資熱度。

en.name: uniQure et al. (AAV gene therapy)
en.pipeline: AAV gene therapy | SCA (multiple subtypes): preclinical/early, still far from the clinic
en.insight: Explored by academic groups and several biotechs; uniQure’s AMT-150 (AAV) has been deprioritised in recent years. A low, long-dated threat that mainly reflects investment appetite in ataxia.

name: Kissei 橘生製藥
mechanism: 小分子（TRH 類似物，症狀治療）
pipeline: Rovatirelin（KPS-0373）｜脊髓小腦退化（SCA6/31 等）：兩項 Ph3 主終點未達，日本藥證 2023/07 撤回、啟動追加 Ph3
insight: 症狀治療型對手，機轉與 Stemchymal 不同、屬間接參考。其 Ph3 失利反映 SCA 單一 Ph3 達標之難。

en.name: Kissei Pharmaceutical
en.pipeline: Rovatirelin (KPS-0373) | spinocerebellar degeneration (SCA6/31 etc.): two Ph3 trials missed their primary endpoint, the Japanese application was withdrawn in 2023/07 and an additional Ph3 started
en.insight: A symptomatic-treatment rival with a different mechanism from Stemchymal, so the read-across is indirect. Its Ph3 failure shows how hard a single Ph3 is to hit in SCA.

name: 學名藥 Riluzole
mechanism: 小分子
pipeline: Riluzole｜SCA（仿單外 off-label）：已上市，僅症狀緩解、無法改變病程
insight: 基準對照，非直接競品；SCA 屬 off-label 使用。

en.name: Generic Riluzole
en.pipeline: Riluzole | SCA (off-label): marketed, symptomatic relief only, does not modify disease course
en.insight: A baseline comparator rather than a direct competitor; use in SCA is off-label.

name: Solaxa
mechanism: 小分子（4-aminopyridine 再定位）
pipeline: SLX-100｜SCA27B：註冊型臨床試驗（2025/03 宣布），與多家共濟失調卓越中心合作
insight: SCA27B（FGF14 GAA 重複）目前無 FDA 核准療法。試驗部分經費來自 CDMRP 對 UCLA Susan Perlman 醫師的 $7.3M 補助——與本社美國二期同一位主持人。與本社 SCA3/6 不同亞型，但若先取證將是 SCA 領域首個核准藥。

updates.text: 宣布 SCA27B 註冊型臨床試驗

en.pipeline: SLX-100 | SCA27B: registrational trial announced 2025/03, run with leading ataxia centres of excellence
en.insight: There is no FDA-approved therapy for SCA27B (FGF14 GAA repeat). The trial is funded in part by a $7.3M CDMRP grant to Dr Susan Perlman at UCLA — the same principal investigator as Steminent's US Phase 2. A different subtype from Steminent's SCA3/6, but the first to reach approval would be the first approved drug in SCA.

updates.text: Announced a registrational trial in SCA27B

name: 安基生技 AnnJi
mechanism: 小分子（降解突變雄性素受體、活化 Nrf1/Nrf2）
pipeline: AJ201（rosolutamide）｜SBMA：Ph1b/2a 完成、規劃全球 Ph3；FDA 孤兒藥資格另含 HD 與 SCA
insight: 台灣本土的 polyQ 玩家。臨床目前僅在 SBMA（甘迺迪症），但孤兒藥資格已涵蓋 SCA，是最可能從鄰近適應症切入 SCA 的在地公司。美國權利已授權 Avenue Therapeutics。

updates.text: KDA 年會公布全球多中心 Ph3 初步設計；獲 FDA 快速通道

en.name: AnnJi Pharmaceutical
en.mechanism: Small molecule (degrades mutant androgen receptor; activates Nrf1/Nrf2)
en.pipeline: AJ201 (rosolutamide) | SBMA: Ph1b/2a complete, global Ph3 planned; FDA orphan designation also covers HD and SCA
en.insight: A Taiwan-based polyQ player. Clinical work is in SBMA (Kennedy's disease) only, but its orphan designation already covers SCA, making it the local company most likely to enter SCA from an adjacent indication. US rights are licensed to Avenue Therapeutics.

updates.text: Presented a preliminary global Ph3 design at the KDA conference; received FDA Fast Track

name: Neurolixis
mechanism: 小分子，5-HT1A 受體促效劑
pipeline: NLX-112（befiradol）｜SCA3（另帕金森）：SCA 臨床前／PD Ph2
insight: SCA 適應症已有美歐孤兒藥資格，但 SCA3 僅有動物數據、尚未進入人體；臨床主戰場是帕金森的左旋多巴引發異動症。

en.pipeline: NLX-112 (befiradol) | SCA3 (also Parkinson's): SCA preclinical / PD Ph2
en.insight: Holds US and EU orphan designations in SCA, but SCA3 evidence is animal-only with no human trial yet; its clinical focus is levodopa-induced dyskinesia in Parkinson's.

name: Seelos Therapeutics
mechanism: 自噬誘導，清除蛋白聚集
pipeline: SLS-005（靜脈 trehalose）｜SCA（SCA3 為主）：註冊型 Ph2/3（已暫停）
insight: SCA3 註冊型 Ph2/3 於 2023/04 因商業考量暫停收案、資源轉向 ALS；公開來源未見重啟。孤兒藥資格與快速通道仍在。

en.pipeline: SLS-005 (IV trehalose) | SCA (mainly SCA3): Registrational Ph2/3 (paused)
en.insight: Its registrational SCA3 Ph2/3 paused enrolment in 2023/04 for business reasons, with resources shifted to ALS; no restart has been reported. Orphan designation and Fast Track remain in place.

name: Wave Life Sciences
mechanism: ASO／RNA 編輯，對偶基因選擇性
pipeline: ATXN3 對偶基因選擇性寡核苷酸｜SCA3：未公開／疑停滯
insight: 平台強項為對偶基因選擇性沉默（HD 的 WVE-003 已顯示選擇性降低突變 HTT）。SCA3 方向自 2018 年宣布將選定候選藥後，公開來源未見進展。

en.pipeline: Allele-selective ATXN3 oligonucleotide | SCA3: Undisclosed / apparently dormant
en.insight: Platform strength is allele-selective silencing (WVE-003 in HD showed selective lowering of mutant HTT). On SCA3, no public progress since it said in 2018 it would nominate a candidate.

name: Design Therapeutics
mechanism: 小分子，標的 GAA 重複、提升 frataxin 表現
insight: GeneTAC 小分子鎖定核苷酸重複擴增。2026/05 RESTORE-FA 四週靜脈給藥數據見劑量依存 frataxin 上升與臨床改善，將走註冊路徑（2026 Q4 更新）。技術概念與 polyQ 相通，值得追蹤是否延伸 SCA。

en.mechanism: Small molecule, targets the GAA repeat to raise frataxin
en.insight: GeneTAC small molecules target nucleotide repeat expansions. Four-week IV data from RESTORE-FA in 2026/05 showed dose-dependent frataxin increases and clinical improvement, with a registrational path to be updated in Q4 2026. The concept is adjacent to polyQ, so watch for extension into SCA.

name: Larimar Therapeutics
mechanism: 蛋白替代，補充 frataxin
pipeline: Nomlabofusp（CTI-1601）｜Friedreich's Ataxia：滾動式 BLA 進行中
insight: Frataxin 蛋白替代療法。2026/02 獲突破性療法認定、2026/06/29 遞交加速核准滾動式 BLA 第一模組——共濟失調領域少見走到 BLA 的案例。

en.pipeline: Nomlabofusp (CTI-1601) | Friedreich's ataxia: Rolling BLA under way
en.insight: A frataxin protein replacement therapy. Breakthrough Therapy designation in 2026/02 and the first module of a rolling BLA for accelerated approval submitted on 2026/06/29 — one of the few ataxia programmes to reach BLA stage.

name: Lexeo Therapeutics
mechanism: AAV 基因療法，提升心肌 frataxin
pipeline: LX2006｜Friedreich's Ataxia 相關心肌病變：註冊型試驗設計定案
insight: AAV 基因療法針對 FA 相關心肌病變。2026/06 樞紐試驗 SUNRISE-FA 2 方案定案，目標 2028 循加速核准遞交 BLA；持有突破性療法、RMAT、孤兒藥、快速通道四項資格。

en.mechanism: AAV gene therapy, raises cardiac frataxin
en.pipeline: LX2006 | Friedreich's ataxia cardiomyopathy: Registrational design finalised
en.insight: AAV gene therapy for FA-associated cardiomyopathy. The SUNRISE-FA 2 pivotal protocol was finalised in 2026/06, targeting a BLA under accelerated approval in 2028; holds Breakthrough, RMAT, Orphan Drug and Fast Track designations.

name: Minoryx Therapeutics
mechanism: 小分子，PPARγ 促效、抗神經發炎
pipeline: Leriglitazone｜Friedreich's Ataxia （另 X-ALD、Rett）：FA 為 Ph2 概念驗證
insight: Leriglitazone 於 FA 有美歐孤兒藥資格與 Ph2 概念驗證，但公司臨床重心已移向 X-ALD 與 Rett 症候群，FA 未見進入樞紐試驗。

en.pipeline: Leriglitazone | Friedreich's ataxia (also X-ALD, Rett): Ph2 proof-of-concept in FA
en.insight: Leriglitazone holds US and EU orphan designations in FA with a Ph2 proof-of-concept, but the company's clinical focus has moved to X-ALD and Rett syndrome, with no pivotal trial in FA.

name: PTC Therapeutics
mechanism: 小分子，15-LO 抑制、氧化壓力
insight: Vatiquinone 的 FA 新藥申請於 2025/08 收到 CRL（未證明實質療效證據）。與 Biohaven 並列「共濟失調小分子在 FDA 卡關」的案例。

en.insight: Vatiquinone's FA NDA received a CRL in 2025/08 (substantial evidence of efficacy not demonstrated). Together with Biohaven, a case of ataxia small molecules stalling at the FDA.

name: REPROCELL
mechanism: 異體 MSC（日本 MAH）
insight: 日本製造販賣業者（MAH）。2026/06/18 向神奈川縣申請 MAH 業許可、2026/06/24 向 PMDA 遞交 Stemchymal 製造販賣承認申請（適應症 SCA3、SCA6），走約 9 個月優先審查。

en.insight: Japanese marketing authorisation holder. Filed for the MAH business licence with Kanagawa Prefecture on 2026/06/18 and submitted the Stemchymal marketing approval application to PMDA on 2026/06/24 (indications SCA3 and SCA6), under a ~9-month priority review.

name: 住友製藥／RACTHERA
mechanism: iPSC 衍生多巴胺神經前驅細胞
insight: 2026/03/06 日本厚生勞動省授予附條件期限核准，適應症為對既有療法（含左旋多巴）反應不佳的帕金森病運動症狀——與 RiHEART 並列全球首批 iPSC 衍生細胞治療核准案。Ph1/2 為 7 人植入，4 人見運動功能改善、無相關嚴重不良事件。

en.insight: On 2026/03/06 Japan's MHLW granted conditional, time-limited approval for motor symptoms of Parkinson's disease in patients not responding to existing therapy including levodopa — together with RiHEART, among the world's first approved iPSC-derived cell therapies. The Ph1/2 implanted 7 patients, with motor improvement in 4 and no related serious adverse events.
en.name: Sumitomo Pharma / RACTHERA

name: Cuorips
mechanism: iPSC 衍生心肌細胞片
insight: 2026/03/06 獲日本附條件期限核准（心衰竭），與 AMCHEPRY 並列全球首批 iPSC 療法。iPS 心肌細胞片外科貼附於心臟表面，促進血管新生。公開報導之日本國內價格為 5,320 萬日圓（約 32.6 萬美元）；2026 年秋季在日本上市。

en.insight: Received Japanese conditional, time-limited approval on 2026/03/06 (heart failure), alongside AMCHEPRY as among the world's first iPSC therapies. Sheets of iPSC-derived cardiomyocytes are surgically applied to the heart surface to promote vascularisation. Reported Japanese price is ¥53.2 million (about US$326,400); launch in Japan planned for autumn 2026.

name: Heartseed
mechanism: iPSC 衍生心肌細胞球
insight: 2026 年 3 月底於信州大學醫院完成 HS-005 首例給藥（EMERALD Ph1/2，擴張型心肌病），為全球首例以導管投與 iPS 心肌細胞球；每 cohort 7 人、共 14 人。既有主力 HS-001 需開胸手術，HS-005 改為經心內膜導管、侵入性較低。

en.insight: Dosed the first HS-005 patient at Shinshu University Hospital in late March 2026 (EMERALD Ph1/2, dilated cardiomyopathy) — the world's first catheter administration of iPSC-derived cardiomyocyte spheroids; 7 patients per cohort, 14 in total. Its earlier lead HS-001 requires open-heart surgery, while HS-005 uses a less invasive endocardial catheter.

name: Healios
mechanism: 體細胞（多能成體前驅細胞）與 iPSC
insight: 以急性呼吸窘迫症候群（ARDS）為主軸，已於日本遞交全球 Ph3 試驗計畫（REVIVE-ARDS，隨機安慰劑對照、最多 550 人，主要終點為無呼吸器天數），策略上尋求依 Ph2 結果在日本取得附條件期限核准；另有缺血性腦中風與外傷適應症、以及 iPSC 衍生基因改造殺手細胞平台。

en.mechanism: Somatic (multipotent adult progenitor) cells and iPSC
en.insight: Centred on acute respiratory distress syndrome (ARDS): a global Ph3 trial plan has been filed in Japan (REVIVE-ARDS, randomised placebo-controlled, up to 550 patients, primary endpoint ventilator-free days), with a strategy of seeking conditional, time-limited approval in Japan on the Ph2 results; also pursuing ischaemic stroke and trauma, plus an iPSC-derived gene-engineered killer cell platform.

name: Cellusion
mechanism: iPSC 衍生角膜內皮細胞
insight: 2023/03 於日本再生醫療學會年會發表首例人體移植（iPS 衍生角膜內皮細胞替代物）結果：術後 3 個月未見不良事件，視力、角膜中央與最薄厚度呈改善趨勢。現正籌備日本公司主導試驗與全球試驗。

en.insight: Reported the first-in-human transplant at the Japanese Society for Regenerative Medicine annual meeting in 2023/03: no adverse events at 3 months, with trends toward improved visual acuity and central/thinnest corneal thickness. Company-sponsored Japanese and global trials are in preparation.

name: Orizuru Therapeutics
mechanism: iPSC 衍生胰島細胞等再生細胞平台
insight: 武田與京大 iPS 細胞研究所 T-CiRA 合作衍生的再生醫療公司，聚焦 iPSC 衍生細胞治療平台（含胰島細胞方向）。公開資訊有限，以官網管線為準。

en.mechanism: iPSC-derived islet and other regenerative cell platforms
en.insight: A regenerative-medicine company spun out of the Takeda–CiRA (T-CiRA) collaboration, focused on iPSC-derived cell therapy platforms including islet cells. Public information is limited; refer to the company pipeline.

name: SCM Lifescience
mechanism: 純系分離異體 MSC（cMSC）
insight: 2020/10/13 與 Steminent 簽署韓國獨家授權，取得 Stemchymal 於 polyQ 型脊髓小腦萎縮症（PolyQ SCA）在韓國的臨床開發與商業化權利；對價含預付金、法規里程碑金與兩位數銷售權利金。自有平台為純系分離（clonal isolation）MSC。

en.insight: Signed an exclusive Korean licence with Steminent on 2020/10/13 for clinical development and commercialisation of Stemchymal in polyglutamine spinocerebellar ataxia in South Korea; terms include an upfront payment, regulatory milestones and a double-digit royalty. Its own platform is clonally isolated MSC.

name: CorestemChemon
mechanism: 自體骨髓 MSC
insight: NeuroNata-R 於 2014 年取得韓國附條件核准用於肌萎縮性側索硬化症（ALS），是神經退化領域少數已上市的 MSC 產品；2026/05 韓國食藥處在完成第三期試驗資料後維持其附條件核准並更新仿單。

en.insight: NeuroNata-R received Korean conditional approval in 2014 for amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, one of the few marketed MSC products in neurodegeneration; in 2026/05 the MFDS maintained the conditional approval and updated the label after the completed Phase 3.

name: MediPost
mechanism: 臍帶血 MSC
insight: Cartistem 於 2012 年 1 月取得韓國食藥處核准，用於膝關節軟骨缺損，是異體臍帶血 MSC 商業化的早期案例；公司另有神經退化方向的細胞治療研發。

en.insight: Cartistem was approved by Korea's MFDS in January 2012 for knee cartilage defects, an early example of commercialised allogeneic cord-blood MSC; the company also runs cell-therapy research in neurodegeneration.

name: ENCell
mechanism: 異體 MSC ＋ 細胞/基因 CDMO
insight: EN001 於 2025/03 取得 FDA 孤兒藥資格（夏柯-馬里-杜斯氏病 CMT）；Ph1 未見劑量限制毒性或輸注相關反應，已進入 Ph1b/2a（NCT06328712，CMT1A），並將適應症擴及裘馨氏肌失養症與肌少症。兼營細胞與基因治療 CDMO。

en.insight: EN001 received FDA orphan drug designation in 2025/03 for Charcot-Marie-Tooth disease; the Ph1 showed no dose-limiting toxicity or infusion-related reactions, and it has advanced to Ph1b/2a (NCT06328712, CMT1A), with expansion into Duchenne muscular dystrophy and sarcopenia. It also operates a cell and gene therapy CDMO.

name: S.Biomedics
mechanism: 多能幹細胞衍生多巴胺前驅細胞
insight: 以 GMP 條件自人類胚胎幹細胞製備高純度腹側中腦多巴胺前驅細胞。2025/07 公布帕金森病 Ph1/2a 12 人移植後一年安全性與療效數據為正面；2026/02 與 Catalent 建立開發與製造夥伴關係。長期追蹤試驗 NCT06477744。

en.insight: Produces high-purity ventral midbrain dopaminergic progenitors from human embryonic stem cells under GMP. In 2025/07 it reported positive safety and efficacy data one year after transplantation in 12 Parkinson's patients (Ph1/2a); in 2026/02 it entered a development and manufacturing partnership with Catalent. Long-term follow-up trial NCT06477744.

name: Pharmicell
mechanism: 自體骨髓 MSC
insight: Cellgram-AMI（急性心肌梗塞）為韓國最早核准的幹細胞藥品之一（2011），常被引用為全球首個獲核准的間質幹細胞藥；公司另營細胞治療 CDMO 與原料事業。細節請以官網與韓國食藥處公告為準。

en.insight: Cellgram-AMI (acute myocardial infarction) was among the first stem cell drugs approved in Korea (2011) and is often cited as the world's first approved mesenchymal stem cell drug; the company also runs cell-therapy CDMO and materials businesses. Verify details against the company site and MFDS announcements.

name: Anterogen
mechanism: 脂肪來源 MSC
insight: 以脂肪來源間質幹細胞在韓國食藥處架構下完成商業化的代表企業（Cupistem 用於克隆氏症肛瘻管）——與本社同屬脂肪 MSC 來源。核准細節請以官網與韓國食藥處公告為準。

en.insight: A leading example of commercialising adipose-derived mesenchymal stem cells under Korea's MFDS framework (Cupistem for Crohn's fistula) — the same cell source as Steminent's. Verify approval details against the company site and MFDS announcements.

name: Kangstem Biotech
mechanism: 臍帶血 MSC
insight: 以臍帶血來源 MSC 平台開發罕病與發炎性疾病療法（如異位性皮膚炎）。公開資訊有限，管線與進度以官網為準。

en.insight: Develops therapies for rare and inflammatory disorders (such as atopic dermatitis) on a cord-blood MSC platform. Public information is limited; refer to the company site for pipeline and status.

name: CHA Biotech
mechanism: 免疫細胞與 MSC 平台、CDMO
insight: 以臍帶血銀行、全球細胞製造與 CDMO 基礎設施為主體的集團型企業，涵蓋免疫細胞與 MSC 平台。公開資訊有限，以官網為準。

en.mechanism: Immune cell and MSC platforms, CDMO
en.insight: A group company built around cord-blood banking, global cell manufacturing and CDMO infrastructure, spanning immune cell and MSC platforms. Public information is limited; refer to the company site.

name: Tego Science
mechanism: 培養組織細胞（角質細胞／纖維母細胞）
insight: 韓國組織工程與細胞製劑商業化的早期案例（培養皮膚細胞產品）。核准年份與適應症請以官網與韓國食藥處公告為準。

en.insight: An early Korean example of commercialised tissue engineering and cell products (cultured skin cell products). Verify approval years and indications against the company site and MFDS announcements.

name: Mesoblast
mechanism: 異體骨髓 MSC
insight: 2024/12/18 獲 FDA 核准，用於 2 個月以上兒童的類固醇難治性急性移植物抗宿主病——首個獲 FDA 核准的間質幹細胞（MSC）產品。核准歷程含 BLA 重新遞交與 PDUFA 展延，是異體 MSC 的 BLA 審查與 CMC 放大量產的關鍵先例。

en.insight: Approved by the FDA on 2024/12/18 for steroid-refractory acute graft-versus-host disease in children aged 2 months and older — the first FDA-approved mesenchymal stem cell product. The path included a BLA resubmission and PDUFA extension, making it the key precedent for allogeneic MSC BLA review and CMC scale-up.

name: Cynata Therapeutics
mechanism: iPSC 衍生 MSC（Cymerus™）
insight: 以 iPSC 為起始細胞量產 MSC，訴求批次一致性與可規模化。CYP-001（急性 GvHD）隨機雙盲 Ph2 已完成全部 65 人的 100 天主要評估期，頂線數據預計 2026/06；CYP-004（膝骨關節炎）Ph3 結果預計 2026/05。

en.insight: Manufactures MSC from iPSC starting material, claiming batch consistency and scalability. The randomised double-blind Ph2 of CYP-001 in acute GvHD completed the 100-day primary evaluation for all 65 participants, with topline expected 2026/06; Ph3 results for CYP-004 in knee osteoarthritis are expected 2026/05.

name: BrainStorm Cell Therapeutics
mechanism: 自體 MSC-NTF（分泌神經營養因子）
insight: 神經退化疾病自體 MSC 的代表案例。第一個 Ph3 已完成；2025/05 取得 FDA 同意啟動 Ph3b（ENDURANCE）並以特殊試驗計畫評估（SPA）協議定案設計：約 200 名症狀未滿兩年的中度 ALS 患者，24 週隨機雙盲對照後接 24 週開放延伸。2026/02 已完成募資、備妥啟動。

en.insight: A leading case of autologous MSC in neurodegeneration. The first Ph3 is complete; in 2025/05 the FDA cleared a Ph3b (ENDURANCE) with the design settled under a Special Protocol Assessment: about 200 patients with moderate ALS and under two years of symptoms, 24 weeks randomised double-blind followed by a 24-week open-label extension. Financing was secured and start-up preparations were under way as of 2026/02.

name: Capricor Therapeutics
mechanism: 異體心臟球衍生細胞
insight: 裘馨氏肌失養症心肌病變。2025 年先收到完全回覆信（FDA 要求補療效資料），其後 FDA 撤回該 CRL 並恢復 BLA 審查，新 PDUFA 目標日 2026/08/22，並已排定細胞、組織與基因治療諮詢委員會會議；重新遞交納入 Ph3 HOPE-3 結果。是罕病細胞治療走 RMAT／加速審查的活教材。

en.insight: For Duchenne muscular dystrophy cardiomyopathy. It received a Complete Response Letter in 2025 (the FDA sought more efficacy data); the FDA subsequently lifted that CRL and resumed BLA review with a new PDUFA target of 2026/08/22, and an advisory committee meeting has been scheduled; the resubmission includes Ph3 HOPE-3 results. A live case study of RMAT and accelerated review for rare-disease cell therapy.

name: BlueRock Therapeutics（Bayer）
mechanism: 多能幹細胞衍生神經元
insight: 帕金森病神經元replacement。已在 exPDite-2 註冊型 Ph3 完成首例給藥（NCT06944522）——為異體多能幹細胞衍生療法在帕金森病的首個 Ph3 樞紐試驗；收案至多 102 人、美國 7 個站點，主要終點為 78 週的每日「ON 時間（無困擾異動症）」，數據預計 2027。36 個月追蹤持續見正面效果。

en.insight: Neuronal replacement in Parkinson's disease. The first patient has been dosed in the registrational exPDite-2 Ph3 (NCT06944522) — the first pivotal Ph3 of an allogeneic pluripotent stem cell-derived therapy in Parkinson's; up to 102 patients at 7 US sites, primary endpoint change in daily ON time without troublesome dyskinesia over 78 weeks, data expected 2027. Positive effects continued at 36 months of follow-up.

name: Ultragenyx
mechanism: 基因療法與小分子
insight: 以小樣本罕病族群的試驗執行與法規互動著稱，多項罕病藥物已取得核准，是罕病開發營運面的參照對象。

en.insight: Known for executing trials and managing regulatory interactions in very small rare-disease cohorts, with several approved rare-disease products — an operational reference for rare-disease development.
